data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant docs to reflect the new hypothesis enforcement gates, RESULT schema changes, and UserPromptSubmit hook.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the new gates so they understand why their investigation results may be rejected.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section, fix-bug quick reference
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md reflects the hypothesis_tests RESULT schema requirement and the RED-before-fix gate
  ← Satisfies: Epic context — ensuring future agents understand the enforcement
- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
